title: Trump's Big Week: Middle East Trip, China Deal, Pharma EO, "Big, Beautiful Bill" with Ben Shapiro
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Ben Shapiro!

(1:53) A Bestie apology to Phil Hellmuth, All-In Poker Tournament

(7:58) Trump's majorly consequential Middle East trip: Saudi, Qatar, Iran, and his vision for a "New Middle East"

(35:18) US-China deal: is the tide turning on tariffs?

(46:33) GOP divided over "Big, Beautiful Bill" due to its impact on our debt spiral

(1:18:48) Science Corner: Montana bans cell-based meat, joining Florida and others

(1:24:31) Trump's EO on pharma prices: role of PBMs, is this too much government intervention?

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Trump's recent Middle East trip, the US-China deal, and the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' with guest Ben Shapiro. They also cover Trump's executive order on pharma prices and the ban on cell-based meat in Montana. The episode touches on various topics, including foreign policy, trade, and government intervention in the economy.

takeaways.text: Trump's Middle East trip was consequential
US-China deal may turn the tide on tariffs
GOP is divided over the 'Big, Beautiful Bill'
Trump's EO on pharma prices aims to lower drug prices
Government intervention in the economy is a concern
The US debt spiral is a major issue
Foreign policy and trade are interconnected

sentiment.notes: The episode has a mixed sentiment, with both optimistic and cautious views on Trump's policies and their impact on the economy and foreign relations.

notable_moments.description: Discussion on Trump's Middle East trip
GOP division over the 'Big, Beautiful Bill'
